name: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
description: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of structuring web content so that LLM-based search engines such as ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews cite or quote it as a source. GEO optimizes for extraction rather than ranking: 30-180 word self-contained answer chunks, entity-first phrasing, named statistics with year, FAQ blocks paired with FAQPage JSON-LD, and off-site brand mentions across Reddit, YouTube, and LinkedIn.

inDefinedTermSet.name: Acme AI Glossary of AI Search and Content Terms
